creator: eksffa@freebsdbrasil.com.br
text:
- Update to 2.0
- This is a MAJOR update. Changelog reads:

	      Major changes.
              Added Meta-SPF checks.
              Reworked logging system. Renamed the program from qmail-sf to
              softfail as well as logfile from qmail-sf.log to softfail.log.
              Changed README to reflect the changes. The relevant loggings
              regarding softfail's decision are still logged on softfail.log;
              However, complementary logging information regarding SPF are
              logged to LOG_MAIL via syslog (usually maillog).
